task_description: Phase 9: Unified Data Plane + Kill Legacy Code. Delete all legacy in-memory api/ folders from 9 apps, create @quant/data-plane package with full BaseRepository<T> (read-replica routing, outbox, audit, field encryption, soft delete, optimistic locking), create @quant/queue (BullMQ wrapper), @quant/storage (S3/MinIO), CDC relay service with Redpanda, and integrate everything into the monorepo build.

verification.summary: All 4 new packages typecheck and test successfully. 56 total tests pass (32 data-plane, 10 queue, 9 storage, 5 cdc-relay). Legacy api/ folders fully deleted (0 .ts files remain). 4 remaining 'new Map<' usages are legitimate (React hooks, encryption session state). Pre-existing failures in @quant/auth, @quant/database unrelated to this phase.
